description: A geologist logs exploration drill core, recording rock type, alteration, mineralization, and structural data.

nodes.task_description: Open the digital core logging software and enter the drillhole ID and depth intervals.

expected_outcome.value: A new logging session is started for the correct drillhole.

nodes.task_description: For each depth interval, record the lithology, mineralogy, and structural features observed in the core.

expected_outcome.value: A detailed geological log is captured in a structured format.

nodes.task_description: Mark the intervals to be sampled for assaying and generate the sample tags.

expected_outcome.value: Sample intervals are defined, and the data is saved to the central database.
